subject_line: Subject: One more thing — INBRAIN US entry
notes: $50M Series B (June 2024). BCI for neural mapping. Spain-based. CEO explicit US clinical expansion signals. | Day 3 email sent 2026-05-30 | Day 7 email sent 2026-05-31
email_body:
Carola,

Last note from me. I came across INBRAIN's recent coverage — the Samsung backing and PERTE grant are strong signals of commercial intent.

I've positioned several European neurotech companies for US entry. The ones that move fastest on commercial infrastructure tend to win. INBRAIN has the technology and capital. The question is execution speed.

If the timing isn't right, completely understood. But if you're open to a brief call, I'm available this week.

Jordan

subject_line: Subject: One more thing — BrainQ US opportunity

If the timing is right, I'm available for a call this week.

Jordan

subject_line: Subject: Final note — Flow Neuroscience US distribution
notes: FDA cleared Dec 2025 — first at-home tDCS for depression. Sweden-based. Series status unclear. Significant US market entry momentum. | Day 3 email sent 2026-05-30 | Day 7 email sent 2026-05-31
us_signals: FDA cleared for at-home use, US market entry imminent
email_body:
Daniel,

Last message from me — I know channel strategy for a depression tDCS device is a specific challenge. The psychiatry landscape, the direct-to-consumer path, and the telehealth opportunity all have different trade-offs.

Flow has the FDA clearance — the first at-home device for depression. That's a major moat. The question is which channel to prioritize first.

I've mapped the top US telepsychiatry platforms and psychiatric hospital networks. Happy to share the analysis as a final gesture.

If the timing isn't right, completely understood. I'm available this week if you'd like to chat.

Jordan

subject_line: Subject: Final note — GrayMatters US Veterans opportunity
notes: FDA cleared. tBSG device for PTSD/depression. Israeli. Targeting US Veterans Affairs (VA) system — high-value but complex government channel. | Day 3 email sent 2026-05-30 | Day 7 email sent 2026-05-31
us_signals: FDA cleared, targeting VA and military health systems
email_body:
Oded,

Last message — I know the VA/military mental health market is complex. The procurement process, the clinical trial requirements for VA adoption, and the veteran advocacy networks all have specific entry points.

GrayMatters has the FDA clearance and the clinical validation. Just hired your first US Chief Commercial — that's the right move at the right time.

I've mapped the top VA hospital research programs and military mental health advocacy organizations. Happy to share the mapping as a final gesture.

If the timing isn't right, completely understood. I'm available this week if you'd like to chat.

Jordan
